text:
Zeke is a mysterious man from the outskirts of the institute and a former student at Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

Human Form

Zeke has light-colored, shaggy hair that descends into a beard and mustache. He wears glasses and is usually seen wearing a coat with an undershirt.

Titan Form

Zeke's Titan has a distinct ape-like appearance, with fur covering most of its body. It has long limbs with fully-functional thumbs. Its body proportions are similar to that of the Principal, with a small head and a massive torso, as well as having well-defined abs.

Personality

In the past, Zeke was a vengeful youth who went as far as to turn himself into a Titan to get revenge on his old bullies, also showcasing his genius intellect. His vengefulness was so strong, that he used his Titan form to torment his former bullies for the rest of their lives. However, he became depressed after his bullies' deaths due to no longer having a purpose.

In the present, he turns students who fail their advancement tests into Titans, deluding himself into believing that he is making their lives better by doing so, though he really does it because he finds no other joy in life and attempts to do so whether they want it or not. He is also shown to be very deceptive, faking fatigue to get Eren to lower his guard down to forcibly transform him into a Titan.

Story

Many years ago, he was bullied by his peers at Attack Junior High and, as an adult, developed a serum that would make him stronger to get his former bullies. The serum made him immortal and gave him healing abilities, while also allowing him to transform into a ape-like Titan every time he re-injects himself.

He would use his Titan form to torment his former bullies for many years, only stopping when they all died of old age. After his bullies' deaths, he became depressed over no longer having a purpose.

One day, he came across an Attack Junior High student who had failed his advancement test and was crying over the possibility of being bullied due to being held back. He then injected the boy with Titan serum, transforming him into a Titan and allowing him to stay at the school and bully new students instead. Although Zeke noted that the students he injects become Titans permanently (hypothesizing it is due to their age), he continued to inject any student who failed their advancement test while deluding himself into thinking he is making their lives better, so he can have a purpose.

As a result of his actions, Attack Junior High became overrun with Titan students over the years. Though one of his victims, who became a Colossal Titan, was able to become the schools headmaster. He became something of an urban legend known as "The Man Who Turns People Into Titans". He was also believed by Frieda's father to transform people who take too many deductions on their taxes. Eventually, the staff of Attack Junior High decided to make the advancement test incredibly easy, such as having the students create a simple origami flower with instructions, so that no one would fail. This deprives him of students to transform for thirty years.

In the present, he finds Eren Jaeger, who failed the advancement test due to forgetting to turn his origami flower in, and attempts to transform him into a Titan. Eren rejects, but he chases after him anyways. Eventually, he is confronted by Eren's friends and Levi, and he injects himself with Titan serum to take his Titan form to defeat them. Eventually, he is picked up by the Colossal Titan and thrown into the innermost wall. Though he survives due to his immortality, he is surrounded by many of his former victims and was never seen again.
